nasb.text: For I will send pestilence to her And blood to her streets, And the wounded will fall in her midst By the sword upon her on every side; Then they will know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: for I will send pestilence into her, and blood into her streets; and the slain shall fall in her midst, by the sword that is against her on every side. Then they will know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必使瘟疫進入西頓， 使血流在它的街上； 必有刀劍四圍攻擊它， 使被殺的人倒在城中， 人就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要使瘟疫进入你境内， 刀剑从四面八方临到你， 被杀的人横尸城中，血流街头， 这样人们就知道我是耶和华。
